name: Branded Disciple
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>烙</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>らく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>印</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>いん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>使</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>し</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>徒</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>と</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: When a monster effect activated by your opponent resolves, if that opponent's monster has 0 ATK or DEF, and you control a Level 8 or higher Fiend Fusion Monster, you can negate that activated effect. At the end of the Damage Step, if monsters with 0 ATK battled each other: You can destroy your opponent's battling monster. You can only use each effect of "Branded Disciple" once per turn.
eff: When a monster effect activated by your opponent resolves, if that opponent's monster has 0 ATK or DEF, and you control a Level 8 or higher Fiend Fusion Monster, you can negate that activated effect. At the end of the Damage Step, if monsters with 0 ATK battled each other: You can destroy your opponent's battling monster. You can only use each effect of "Branded Disciple" once per turn.

mst: Negates the effects of your opponent's Effect Monsters
misc: Requires control of specific Monster card type
